anchor_policy: Every claim cites either (a) an audit JSON path produced by an ANIM-02 muscle script, (b) a filesystem read at a specified path, or (c) an upstream-of-record quote with byte offset.

subprojects_G8.section_first_para_quoted: Pixar-styled character animation pipeline: brand tokens + character descriptors + lyrics → character bibles → turnarounds → backgrounds → shots → image-to-video clips → assembled videos cut to lyrics. Issued under Work Order `APEX-ANIM-MB-WO-00001` (operator-owned at `C:/Users/Owner/Documents/Claude/Projects/breaking down complex tasks/APEX-ANIM-Production-System.md`).
phase_rows_quoted_verbatim: - ANIM-01 — Capability map of existing animation pipeline / models / character assets / governance state. Codex silent-twice rounds 11+12 (2026-06-07). Cert: `CERT-ANIM-01.json`. PR: bermingham85/code-artifacts#7 awaiting operator merge (MA-ANIM-001 in MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json).

- ANIM-02 — Install/verify missing models (HunyuanVideo + kohya_ss only — FLUX/Wan/LTX already present per ANIM-01); dedupe duplicate LoRAs; register music-video muscles APEX-MB-PY-00106..00108; record WO §0 R20 mislabel correction (F6).
- ANIM-03 — Character-Build agent (S1 bible + S2 turnaround + S3 reference pack). First subjects: galinda + one Jesse-Adventures lead. Pre-flight resolves F1 Galinda Phase 2.2 sign-off discrepancy.
- ANIM-04 — Environment/Imagery agent (S4 backgrounds from brand tokens + scene descriptors). Supabase QC schema row is operator-gated (G10).
- ANIM-05 — Video agent (S6 first shots → clips via Wan 2.2 i2v MoE local; fal.ai cloud fallback wired here per G9 — key-resolution route TBD at start of phase).

- ANIM-06 — Assembly (S7 first clip cut to existing lyrics via the real `muscle_music_video.py --mode stitch` path, NOT the WO's aspirational `music_video_pipeline/assemble_video.py` label). **First visible deliverable.**

- ANIM-07+ — Scale across remaining characters and brands; in parallel under the 3-cap, recover + commit the AGEN core-five (Specification/Verification/Architecture/Builder/Router) from `X:/Automations/apex/spawned_prompts/AGEN-*` and Codex transcripts. Note: AGEN-completion handover declares the build artifacts deleted from canonical mirrors — recovery is transcript-only rebuild, not checkout-and-commit (G11 + MA-AGEN-001 in MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json).
